name: Suss-Saures Kartoffelgemuse (Sweet-and-sour Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the potatoes.
2. Add diced onion, salt, pepper, and sugar to a covered bowl.
3. In a small frypan, cook the bacon until crisp.
4. Add vinegar to the hot bacon and bring to a boil.
5. Pour immediately over the potato mixture, mixing well.
6. If too tart, add a little more sugar before serving.
7. Optionally, add endive or leaf lettuce for enhanced flavor.
